# dismissedbankruptcy.org

> Guide to dismissed bankruptcy cases -- what happens, refiling, and your options.

dismissedbankruptcy.org is a free, open-source educational resource about dismissed bankruptcy cases. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://dismissedbankruptcy.org/: Overview of dismissed bankruptcy -- what it means and what comes next
- https://dismissedbankruptcy.org/reasons-for-dismissal.html: Common reasons bankruptcy cases get dismissed
- https://dismissedbankruptcy.org/dismissed-vs-discharged.html: Dismissed vs discharged -- understanding the critical difference
- https://dismissedbankruptcy.org/can-i-refile.html: Can I refile after dismissal -- waiting periods and restrictions
- https://dismissedbankruptcy.org/what-happens-next.html: What happens after your case is dismissed
- https://dismissedbankruptcy.org/employer-impact.html: Does a dismissed bankruptcy affect your employment

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
